scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n agent,web "npm run dev -w @video-compressor/agent" "npm run dev -w @video-compressor/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build -w @video-compressor/agent
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @video-compressor/shared && npm run build -w @video-compressor/web
scripts.deploy:web: node scripts/verify-web-env.mjs && npm run build:web && node scripts/verify-release.mjs --deploy && node scripts/verify-published-release.mjs && npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name wishly-app --branch main
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && node scripts/verify-release.mjs --package && zsh scripts/package-mac.sh
scripts.format: prettier --write apps packages tests scripts docs supabase/functions README.md TESTER_GUIDE.md RELEASE_NOTES.md THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md package.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check apps packages tests scripts docs supabase/functions README.md TESTER_GUIDE.md RELEASE_NOTES.md THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md package.json
scripts.types:supabase: npx supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public
